# Development for TRACE / SIVACOR

## TRACE

Implementations bring up issues, which need review and implementation.

> We need you!

## Current known issues

These are in scope for inclusion in the next release of TRACE:

- **Explicit** rather than implicit disclaimers ([issue 37 ⏳](https://github.com/transparency-certified/trace-specification/issues/37))
- TRO software: what created the TRO? ([issue 11 ✅](https://github.com/transparency-certified/trace-specification/issues/11), included in `0.1`)
- Describe the **software environment** used to create an arrangement ([issue 10 ⏳](https://github.com/transparency-certified/trace-specification/issues/10))

## SIVACOR

Allows to demonstrate features that are relevant for TRACE in an open testable environment

## Recent additions

- Automatic file-level redaction (removing files) ([frontend #27 ⏳](https://github.com/SIVACOR/aea-sivacor/issues/27), [backend #81 ✅](https://github.com/SIVACOR/girder-sivacor/pull/81))
- Multi-software workflow support ([backend #14 ✅](https://github.com/SIVACOR/girder-sivacor/issues/14))
- Environment variables ("secrets") ([frontend #29 ✅](https://github.com/SIVACOR/aea-sivacor/pull/29), [backend #82 ✅](https://github.com/SIVACOR/girder-sivacor/pull/82))
